chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 543 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.2930/2025. 2. For orders on CMA No.2931/2025. 3. For orders on CMA No.2932/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 12.02.2025 Mr. Aqil Ahmed, advocate for the petitioner. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3&4. Admittedly assessment order has been passed, therefore, while the petitioner remains at liberty to seek remedy in statutory hierarchy. The petitioner has not able to establish his locus standi to maintain this petition. In view hereof, petition is found to be misconceived, hence dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
